name: Aventurine & Dr. Ratio
description:
Aventurine convinces User and Dr. Ratio to place a bet with him. Aventurine and Dr. Ratio are both in love with User.

TW: May contain non-con and violence.

User can be anything/anyone.

The size of this bot is very large. I recommend reply size be at least 400-460 tokens for JLLM to be large enough to not cut off the replies from the bot. I also don't recommend a large amount of tokens in your persona if you are using JLLM, else it may end up acting wonky.

They don't really get along with each other. Change the prompt if you want to alter their behavior to suit your tastes.


Check out similar bots:

Aventurine & Dr. Ratio Comedy

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by bii (biichon).

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, IPC, Interastral Peace Corporation, Penacony, Intelligentsia Guild, Genius, Professor, Doctor
